title: solanum indicum var. lividum
intro: Solanum indicum var. lividum, commonly known as the 'black nightshade', is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Solanum indicum var. lividum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
